$comment: Token Accessibility config for the Bounded Systems brand. One config drives the WHOLE suite (vendor/conformance-kit/gates/token-a11y.mjs, ck-token-a11y) over the generated tokens.css, and the runner FAILS CLOSED if any gated member fails. Members: palette (CVD-safe/APCA/non-text), pairing (coverage — derives fg×bg pairings from the brand CSS ∪ the declared set; report-only superset), typography (1.4.12/1.4.4/1.4.8), targetSize (2.5.8 AA ≥24px / 2.5.5 AAA), opacity (effective composited contrast — 1.4.3/1.4.11), likeness (near-duplicate hygiene + categorical distinctness, 1.4.1). Paths resolve relative to this file's dir (tokens/). NO exemptions: accessible for everyone.

pairing.$comment: Coverage engine. Derives the REAL fg×bg pairings from actual stylesheet usage across the brand surfaces, UNIONs the hand-declared palette.pairings.json in, and scores every pair. Report-only (gate:false): the extractor over-generates a reviewed superset, so it informs coverage without failing CI — the hand-declared palette member is the fail-closed gate.

targetSize.$comment: Interactive-target size tokens the brand ships (mirrors tokens.json `control`). Every declared target ≥24×24 (2.5.8 AA); control-md/lg meet 2.5.5 (AAA, 44px).

opacity.$comment: The cross-cutting guard. Every place the brand reduces a foreground's opacity over a known backdrop, so the gate composites it and checks the EFFECTIVE contrast. These are the post-fix values (the three regressions the suite caught are fixed): the résumé contact separator no longer carries opacity (solid 5.28:1), and the contact-link underline is raised to 60% so its composited hairline clears the 3:1 non-text floor.

likeness.$comment: Hygiene (near-duplicate tokens, ΔE<~2 → warn) + distinctness (categorical status colours must stay separable under normal AND deuteranopia/protanopia/tritanopia → error). Three exact aliases by design — one canonical value, multiple semantic names: card≡white (#FFFFFF), card-alt≡paper (#EDEAE1; collapsed from cream), ink-mono≡ink-soft (#5C6B63; collapsed from ink-500). The two near-dups the suite previously warned on (ink-soft≈ink-mono ΔE 0.92, paper≈card-alt ΔE 1.78) were imperceptible, so they were collapsed to exact aliases. conformance-kit ≥0.8.0 recognises identical-value aliases automatically (noRedundantTokens true); the ignore list keeps older pins clean too. The grade trio must not collapse.
